name: Jana | Annoying stepsister
description:
BOT 6/6
"Get out of here PERVT!"

Your parents went on a trip to a 5* resort and left you alone with your stepsister

LLOYD FRONTERAAAAAAAAAA!!!!


so... I would like to make something clear from the start, this is not a re-uploaded Bot, this is an inspiration I had from one of my creators. I made my own version of Jana and it's not the same type as the creator of the bot, except for the personality which would be the same or more or less What do I mean by that? I mean Jana's personality would be more or less the same as the one that @oddloop did, a pain in the ass basically., all credits go to @oddloop the creator of the bot of jana, who is an excellent creator and one of my favorites on this platform, so my inspiration for this bot I owe to him. It should be noted that the introduction will be different XD


but anyways, enjoy the bot :3
